title: School places sufficiency survey data
body: "This release provides transparency data from the voluntary one-off survey on school places, sent to local authorities in England, in September 2020. Included in this release are:   school level capacity data for academic year 2019 to 2020 for a small number of state-funded primary and secondary schools in England planned additional places in mainstream schools that relied on ongoing building work, mainly for academic year 2021 to 2022, for those local authorities that responded  "
